description: Chrome autofill parser reads Web Data SQLite autofill table — NOTE: timestamps are Unix epoch SECONDS not WebKit
steps: Query: SELECT name, value, count, date_created, date_last_used FROM autofill WHERE date_created > 0 ORDER BY date_created ASC
IMPORTANT: date_created is Unix epoch SECONDS (not WebKit microseconds) — ts_ns = date_created * 1_000_000_000
Description: '{name}: {value}'. Attrs: name, value, count (i32), date_last_used (i64)
Test factory creates autofill table with date_created as Unix seconds
Test: parse_single_autofill_entry — attrs[name] and attrs[value] correct
